comment: Coordinate descent over ALL inversion params with calibration-only 2x downsampling -- the per-trial pipeline (stage B1/B2: crop/percentiles/wb/print) runs on a buffer area-resampled 2x in linear working space, ~2.7x faster per trial; vignette + film base stay full-res (computed once in the prefix) and the EMD scoring is still measured full-res. Params drift slightly (roll 2506-1 @2x: exposure ~0.01, wb ~0.01, well within TOL_GT_*), so this is for the SEARCH; ALWAYS re-validate the fitted preset at full res (drop the downsample / --downsample 1) before adopting it. Same as inversion_default otherwise.
